title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Lean Manufacturing: The Mass Production System vs.
Lean Production System, Origins and Necessity of Lean Manufacturing, Lean
Revolution: Toyota Production System (TPS), Systems Thinking in Lean,
Basic Principles of Lean Production, Customer Focus in Lean, Overview of
Waste (MUDA)

title: Module 2
content:
Tools and techniques for Lean Manufacturing: 5S System (Sort, Set in
Order, Shine, Standardize, Sustain), Total Productive Maintenance (TPM),
Standardized Work and its Elements, Introduction to Just In Time (JIT),
Kanban System and Pull Production, Value Stream Mapping (VSM)

title: Module 3
content:
Quality improvement: Jidoka (Automation with a Human Touch), Poka-
Yoke (Mistake Proofing) Systems, Six Sigma: Concepts and Methodology,
Introduction to Quality Function Deployment (QFD), Failure Modes and
Effects Analysis (FMEA), Total Quality Management (TQM) Tools and
Techniques

title: Module 4
content:
Employee
involvement
and
continuous
improvement:
Worker
Involvement Techniques (Quality Circles, Suggestions Programs), Kaizen
Philosophy
and
Practices,
Hoshin
Planning
(Systematic
Planning
Methodology), Lean Culture and its Importance, Overview of Concurrent
Engineering, Basics of Design of Experiments (DoE)
